stt.heardError: Sɔri, a nɔ bin ebul fɔ yɛri yu. Duya tray bak.
stt.micAccessError: Nɔ ebul fɔ akses maykrofon. Chek di permishɔn dɛn.

title.clickToMinimize: Klik fɔ mek yu smɔl smɔl

error.noSource: No avatar sɔs nɔ de we dɛn gi (avatarUrl ɔ avatarData)

greetings.0: Hi! Aw a go ɛp yu tide?
greetings.1: Adu! Wɛlkɔm! Wetin a go du fɔ yu?
greetings.2: Kushɛ-o! So gladi fɔ tɔk to yu!
greetings.3: Adu! A de ya fɔ ɛp. Wetin yu nid?
greetings.4: Kushɛ! Aw di bɔdi? Aw a go bi yusful pɔsin?

waiting.2: Di we aw dɛn de prosɛs...
waiting.4: A de chɛk dat fɔ yu...
